# Phase 04: Observability Integration - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-03-11
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Source:** Auto-generated by /gsd:drive (no user discussion)

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Executor agents can query real telemetry data instead of relying solely on source code and user-pasted context. Config format for telemetry endpoints, executor agent telemetry queries, debug log pulling.

**Success Criteria:**
1. `.planning/config.json` supports an `observability` section with endpoint configs (log sources, error trackers)
2. `/gsd:debug` pulls real error logs from configured endpoints when available
3. Executor agents query telemetry before/after changes when endpoints are configured (opt-in, no-op if unconfigured)

</domain>
